free_text: Investigation of 6Li-induced reactions from 54 to 99
MeV on Pd targets
6Li+++ Beam.
Foils were produced from metal powder by annealing
and rolling. Foil was oriented at an angle of 45
degrees with respect to the beam making target
thickness sqrt(2) times values given.
. Beams were obtained directly from the
accelerator without the use of degrader foils.
. Longitudinally segmented Faraday cup.
Target thickness was determined by measuring the
amount of energy degradation of known alpha particle
groups from a 212Po source.
. Used for in-beam and off-line measurements.
Corrected for:
. target angle and enrichment,
. dead time losses,
. Faraday cup leakage and composite production of a
species via both reactions and decay.
Estimated error in data of the combined
uncertainties from:
. fitted gamma ray areas,
. beam charge integration,
. target thickness measurements,
. gamma ray branching ratios.
. Geometry-dependent Hybrid Model, which
describes the time evolution of nuclear reactions by
means of compound-nuclear evaporation and pre-
equilibrium nucleon emission processes.
Paper does not contain some important details of
experiment.  Therefore, the interpretation of some
results is ambiguous.
No reply from C. Castenada to author proof.
Converted from data set B0001, compiled at
KaChaPaG, and updated at CAJaD.
OS. STATUS updated, REACTION corrected in
sub.31
** COMMENT BY CAJAD COMPILER ** According to ENSDF-90
metastable state has a half-life of 39.6 min. 875-keV
gamma ray abundance is 0.73+-0.07 for ground state
decay and 0.032+-0.002 for metastable decay.
Therefore metastable state contribution is negligilbe.
Self-supporting metallic Pd foils, enriched to 95.25 %
104Pd, 14.8 or 3.91 mg/cm**2 thick.
Energy resolution is 1.8 keV at 1.1 MeV.
Measured in situ residual activity 15 minutes,
off line for approximately 1 hr.
. High Spin Isomer.
** COMMENT BY COMPILER ** Metastable state decays with
a half-life of ~54 sec. Therefore, production for both
ground and metastable states is measured.
Self-supporting metallic Pd foils, enriched to 95.25 %
104Pd, 14.8 or 3.91 mg/cm**2 thick.
Energy resolution is 1.8 keV at 1.1 MeV.
Measured in situ residual activity 15 minutes,
off line for approximately 1 hr.

Therefore, metastable state contribution is small.

state.
